name: coTfsMonitorGetStatistics
title: coTfsMonitorGetStatistics
syntax: long coTfsMonitorGetStatistics( dword nodeId, dword requestType, dword minValue[1], dword maxValue[1], dword averageValue[1], dword passedCounter[1] , dword failedCounter[1]);
description: This function returns the statistics information that are monitored between coTfsMonitorActivate and coTfsMonitorDeactivate.
